3120430.name: 奇幻大乱斗
3120430.description:
In the magical world of Fantasy Brawl, each hero possesses unique skills and combat styles. Carefully select 5 heroes to form your dream team and showcase your strategic wisdom in automatic battle arenas.

🎯 **Core Features**
• Auto-Battle Mode - Focus on pre-battle formation and character synergy strategies
• 50+ Powerful Equipment - Create unlimited tactical combinations through free customization
• Unique Skill System - Each hero has exclusive active and passive abilities
• Deep Strategic Gameplay - Front-line tanks protect back-line damage dealers with class synergy

⚔️ **Combat Experience**
In intense 5v5 battles, you must strategically position front-line tanks, back-line damage dealers, and support characters. Through equipment combinations and skill synergies, create the perfect formation that matches your tactical style. Every battle is a test of your strategic thinking!
3120430.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 韩语
